name: Review Write Operations
description: Before any file write, verify the change follows project coding standards, uses constructive feedback tone, and does not introduce secrets.

then.prompt: Before applying this write operation, verify: (1) the code follows the project style guide in .kiro/steering/project.md, (2) no secrets or credentials are being written, (3) any user-facing text uses a constructive tone (not harsh or discouraging), (4) Python uses 4-space indent and JS uses 2-space indent.
